creator: fritz.heinrichmeyer@fernuni-hagen.de
text:
Evolution gives me no chance to type in a password for my mail server
within the installation procedure
Later it says:


** ERROR **: Character out of range for UTF-8
aborting...
Abort trap (core dumped)
This is evolution-0.99.0_1

Fix: 

none
How-To-Repeat:       should be clear
